name: Obi-Wan Kenobi
description:
BLANK BOT

Creativity freedom beckons!

A soul in solicitude, troubled since the very beginning.

As a scenario bot, it will follow the prompt you suit it. Back on time, I have tried it with random to serious scenarios and it gave me very enjoyable results xD

One of my first bots, probably the fifth, and I certainly have taken my time to finish it ...

Any feedback and comment is highly appreciated!
